## TRM1.3. Adherence to ATFM slots (PI#1)

ATFM slot adherence in 2025 was equal to 95.1%, very close to 2024 value -- last year of RP3 -- of 94.2%. With regard to the 4.9% of flights that did not adhere, 3.2% were early and 1.7% were late.

All the airports above 26,000 IFR departures showed adherence above 93%; all airports below that traffic showed a 100% adherence.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of ATFM slot adherence across Member States in 2025 was 96.1%.
